Off Calendar Dec-28-2015 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-12-2015 Advanced From Dec-08-15 To Dec-02-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-02-2015 Continued To Dec-28-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Philip Batchelder, for Petitioner Amy Yamamoto.

The Court asked counsel to address the issues referenced in the examiner's notes. Mr. Batchelder advised the Court that he had now provided a proposed order, and would be in position to address the remaining issues in a few days. He requested that the Court continue the status hearing for a brief period. Pursuant to counsel's request, the status hearing was continued to December 28, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares.
